creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text: Nothing currently depends on deskutils/plasma[56]-sddm-kcm, so there is really no automated upgrade path from deskutils/plasma5-sddm-kcm to deskutils/plasma6-sddm-kcm. We can't add a MOVED entry, since the plasma5 desktop is still supported at this time. At best, I think, we can add an UPDATING entry.
